title: The Flight of Yazdagird from Fars to Khurasan
description: According to 'Ali b. Muhammad (al-Mada'ini)-MaslamahDawud: Ibn 'Amir arrived in Bagrah; then he set out for Fars and (2863) conquered it. Yazdagird fled from Jur-which is [the chief town of the district of] Ardashir -Khurrah117-in the year 30 (65o-5 1). Ibn 'Amir sent Mujashi' b. Mas'ud al-Sulami in pursuit, and he followed (Yazdagird) to Kirman. Mujashi' made camp with the army at al-Sirajan, lls while Yazdagird fled to Khurasan. According to (al-Mada 'ini), [the tribe of] 'Abd al -Qays states that Ibn 'Amir sent Harim b.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 15
